record.title: AtlasNet for Robust Image Classification
record.contentSummary: A benchmark dataset is available for a small pilot analysis.

textBlocks.text: We propose the AtlasNet framework for robust image classification.
The experiment evaluates AtlasNet on the OpenImages dataset.
Results show AtlasNet achieves an F1-score of 84.2 percent.
F1 is the primary metric reported for every experiment.
A limitation is the small evaluation cohort used for external validation.
Future work will evaluate a larger cohort in multiple hospitals.
